title: Past perfect in stories
subtitle: Show what happened before another past event.
overview: Show what happened before another past event.
Module: Natural Grammar and Chunks. B1 Core develops balanced English: stronger stories, clearer opinions, practical writing, conversation repair, native-style input, and confident spoken output.

sections.title: B1 core focus
rows: Past perfect helps you explain the earlier event in a past story.
过去完成时能帮助你解释过去故事中更早发生的事。
Useful frame: learn the pattern, hear it in context, say it with your own detail.
实用框架：学习句型、在语境中听到它、用自己的细节说出来。
Use past perfect to explain why something happened.
用过去完成时解释某事为什么发生。
I was nervous before the call because I had never explained a technical problem in English before.
电话前我很紧张，因为我以前从未用英语解释过技术问题。

items.en: Past perfect helps you explain the earlier event in a past story.
items.zh: 过去完成时能帮助你解释过去故事中更早发生的事。

items.en: Useful frame: learn the pattern, hear it in context, say it with your own detail.
items.zh: 实用框架：学习句型、在语境中听到它、用自己的细节说出来。

items.en: I was nervous before the call because I had never explained a technical problem in English before.
items.zh: 电话前我很紧张，因为我以前从未用英语解释过技术问题。

items.en: I can say this slowly first, then again with a more natural rhythm.
items.zh: 我可以先慢速说这句，然后再用更自然的节奏说一遍。

items.en: The goal is not a perfect sentence; the goal is a useful sentence I can actually say.
items.zh: 目标不是完美句子；目标是我真的能说出来的有用句子。

items.en: I will keep the main idea clear and add only the details that help.
items.zh: 我会保持主要意思清楚，只加入有帮助的细节。

items.en: If I get stuck, I can repair the sentence and continue.
items.zh: 如果我卡住了，我可以修正句子并继续说。

items.en: This lesson should become part of my spoken English, not just something I understand.
items.zh: 这节课应该变成我口语的一部分，而不只是我理解的内容。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Use past perfect to explain why something happened.
lines.zh: 用过去完成时解释某事为什么发生。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: I was nervous before the call because I had never explained a technical problem in English before.
lines.zh: 电话前我很紧张，因为我以前从未用英语解释过技术问题。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Can you say the same idea more simply?
lines.zh: 你能把同一个意思说得更简单吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Yes. I will keep the key idea, one reason, and one example.
lines.zh: 可以。我会保留核心意思、一个原因和一个例子。

items.en: Use past perfect to explain why something happened.
items.zh: 用过去完成时解释某事为什么发生。

items.en: Make one version about your real life.
items.zh: 做一个关于你真实生活的版本。

items.en: Record it once slowly and once at normal speed.
items.zh: 慢速录一遍，再用正常速度录一遍。

items.en: Listen again and improve one thing: clarity, rhythm, or detail.
items.zh: 再听一遍，并改进一个方面：清晰度、节奏或细节。

items.en: Use the best sentence again tomorrow so it becomes automatic.
items.zh: 明天再次使用最好的句子，让它变得自动化。
